mapper.sql:
( SELECT fin_prdt_cd, max_save_trm, max_intr_rate, max_intr_rate2, deposit_product_id FROM ( SELECT fin_prdt_cd, save_trm AS max_save_trm, intr_rate AS max_intr_rate, intr_rate2 AS max_intr_rate2, deposit_product_id,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY fin_prdt_cd ORDER BY CASE WHEN save_trm = 12 THEN 1 -- 가장 우선 WHEN save_trm < 12 THEN 2 -- 그 다음 ELSE 3 -- 제외 대상 END, save_trm DESC -- 같은 우선순위면 큰 기간 먼저 ) AS rn FROM deposit_option ) tmp WHERE rn = 1 )
mapper.select: SELECT dp.kor_co_nm AS bank_name, dp.fin_prdt_nm AS product_name, dp.etc_note AS etc_note, opt.max_save_trm, opt.max_intr_rate, opt.max_intr_rate2, opt.deposit_product_id FROM deposit_product dp LEFT JOIN opt ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = opt.fin_prdt_cd ORDER BY opt.max_intr_rate DESC

SELECT dp.kor_co_nm as bank_name, dp.fin_prdt_nm as product_name, dp.etc_note as etc_note, opt.max_save_trm, opt.max_intr_rate, opt.max_intr_rate2, opt.deposit_product_id FROM deposit_product dp LEFT JOIN opt ON dp.fin_prdt_cd = opt.fin_prdt_cd WHERE dp.kor_co_nm = #{bankName} ORDER BY opt.max_intr_rate DESC
